title: Aletheia Semantic Project Config
description: Schema for aletheia_toolchain project configuration files consumed by create_file_map_v3, manifest_doctor, and tool_command_linter.

source_scope.description: Root paths (relative or absolute) that tools should scan by default.

profiles.description: Named scan profiles.  Each key is a profile name; each value is a profile object.

architecture_expectations.description: Structural expectations used by manifest_doctor and downstream analysis tools.

required_paths.description: Relative paths that must appear in every manifest.

required_exts.description: File extensions (with leading dot) that must appear in every manifest.

risk_rules.description: Thresholds and toggles for manifest_doctor health checks.

runtime_dynamics.description: Settings that vary between execution environments (local, CI, agent).

gates.description: Boolean flags that enable or disable phase gates.

plugins.description: List of plugin module paths to load at runtime.

profile.description: A named scan profile that overrides built-in defaults.

include_exts.description: File extensions to include (with leading dot, e.g. '.py').

exclude_dirs.description: Directory names to skip during scanning.

max_file_size.description: Maximum individual file size in bytes before WARN.

suspicious_dirs.description: Directory names whose presence triggers a manifest WARN.

required_paths.description: Relative paths that must appear in the manifest for it to be healthy.

required_exts.description: Extensions that must appear at least once in the manifest.

max_rows_soft.description: Row count above which manifest_doctor emits WARN.

max_rows_hard.description: Row count above which manifest_doctor emits BLOCK.

disabled_linter_rules.description: Linter rule IDs to suppress for this profile (e.g. ['R002']).

format.description: Default slicer output format for this profile. Consumed by semantic_slicer_v7.0.py.
